data.text: Replaced all raw palette classes (gray-*, blue-*, emerald-*, red-*) with semantic design tokens on the project overview page. ACTIONS accent classes mapped to bg-accent-lever (drain), bg-accent-fulcrum (align), bg-fg-ink (checks). Raw text-xl/text-lg/text-3xl swapped to text-headline-lg/text-headline-md, font-mono → font-mono-code with text-mono-code. Error alert uses error/dark-error tokens. Frontend `bun run check` passes with 0 errors.
